subcodes.first_line: Universal praise hath appeared from the Kingdom of divine bounty, and in this station thanksgiving is incumbent upon all things through His rustling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد عمومی از ملکوت عنایت الهی ظاهر و در اینمقام شکر اشیا لازم که از حفیفش
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @banishment to; life in 'Akka
